title: Dopamine D2 Receptor Modulating mPFC-BLA Circuitry Contributes to Chronic REM Sleep Deprivation-Induced Memory Impairment in Mice
author: LIU, Xiaodong
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Bulk RNA sequencing of the medial prefrontal cortex (mPFC).  This study includes two groups: sham and chronic sleep deprivation (CSD), each with four replicates. Mice underwent either sham treatment or CSD for 14 days, after which mPFC samples were collected for bulk RNA sequencing. Detailed methodologies are provided in the manuscript. 
 The file  Counts.csv  is the matrix of gene counts derived from bulk RNA sequencing. 
 The file  all_up_GOBP.txt  contains Gene Ontology Biological Process (GOBP) annotation results for all upregulated genes. The GOBP annotations were conducted in the Enrichr. 
 The files  cluster1.txt, cluster2.txt, cluster3.txt  contain GOBP annotation results for clusters 1–3 of upregulated genes. GOBP annotations were performed using   Enrichr. 
 The file CSD_PFC_bulk.R is the R code for RNA sequencing analysis.
steps_raw:

Mice underwent either sham treatment or CSD for 14 days, after which mPFC samples were collected for bulk RNA sequencing. Detailed methodologies are provided in the manuscript. 
 The file  Counts.csv  is the matrix of gene counts derived from bulk RNA sequencing. 
 The file  all_up_GOBP.txt  contains Gene Ontology Biological Process (GOBP) annotation results for all upregulated genes. The GOBP annotations were conducted in the Enrichr. 
 The files  cluster1.txt, cluster2.txt, cluster3.txt  contain GOBP annotation results for clusters 1–3 of upregulated genes. GOBP annotations were performed using   Enrichr. 
 The file CSD_PFC_bulk.R is the R code for RNA sequencing analysis.
